name: Spicy Manhattan Fish Chowder
recipeIngredient: 8 Saffron threads, dissolved in 1/2 cup water
1/2 lb Scrod or grouper, filleted and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, sauté the diced green bell peppers and cubed yellow onions in hot sesame oil for 4 to 5 minutes on high heat.
2. Add the chopped fresh tomatoes, finely chopped parsley, salt, freshly ground black pepper, dissolved saffron threads with water, crushed garlic, and water.
3. Mix well and cook over medium heat, covered, for 15 to 20 minutes.
4. Add the cubed Scrod or grouper and continue cooking for an additional 15 minutes until the fish is cooked through.
5. Serve hot over brown rice. Yield: 2 to 4 servings.
Variation: For added flavor, substitute two tablespoons of curry powder for the saffron threads.
